instructions: PRD-187 materiality eval corpus. Dustin fills this in. Add one case per historical pre-market morning. For each case: list the central-bank feed items as they appeared that morning (verbatim title/summary/link/published_at), then set `label` to the GROUND TRUTH: 'SHOCK' if that morning carried a genuine unscheduled structural regime shock (BoJ-class), 'QUIET' otherwise (ordinary/scheduled/noisy news). Include realistic true-negatives (noisy-but-not-structural mornings) - false-positive discipline is the whole point. The harness REFUSES to run until every case has a 'QUIET' or 'SHOCK' label. The false-positive threshold T is passed on the command line, not stored here; set it strict.

entry_schema.source_name: Federal Reserve | European Central Bank | Bank of Japan | Bank of England | People's Bank of China
entry_schema.title: verbatim feed item title
entry_schema.link: source_url (domain must be in the allowlist)

entries.title: <verbatim ordinary headline, e.g. a routine speech or scheduled release>
